localization.help_page2_substitue: Substitue for all symbols except Scatter
localization.help_page3:
Happy Diamonds is 4 reel game with 10 winlines.
In case of Win on winline, winning symbols dissapear
and new symbols from higher positions on reels fall in their places.
localization.help_page6_rules:
All values are expressed as actual wins in credits.

All symbols pay from left to right on selected paylines.
Free spin wins are added to the payline win.
When winning on multiple paylines, all wins are added to the total win.
Only the highest win is payed per line.
Only the highest scatter win is payed.
During free games, 3 or more SCATTER retrigger 15 free games.

MALFUNCTION VOIDS ALL PAYS AND PLAYS.

Theoretical RTP of the game is minimum 93% and maximum 98%
High volatility games pay out less often but the cance to hit big wins in short time span is higher.
localization.help_page7:
To gamble any win press GAMBLE BUTTON.
Then select the right color (RED/BLACK) or a SUIT to win.
Win is DOUBLED (x2) if RED/BLACK choice is correct.
Win is QUADRUPLED (x4) if SUIT choice is correct.
Winnings may be gambled until Gamble limit is reached
(maximum 5 times or the limit is reached before).
localization.help_page8:
Settings button opens settings menu that contain settings which affects the way the game is being played per each login.
In game settings menu adjust number of lines and bet per line that you want to use in the game.
Help opens information game page.
CREDIT and BET labels show the current balance and current total bet
Start starts the game.
Exit exit the game.
Autoplay start automatic game play.
Left button and Right button scroll between information pages.
Close button closes the information screen.
Space on the keyboard can be used to start or stop spin.
localization.help_page9:
Press and hold the START button triggers AUTOPLAY

STOP AUTOPLAY

AFTER EACH GAME - press START button and AUTOPLAY will stop.
IF SINGLE WIN EXCEEDS - whenever a single win is above the sum written in this field, Autoplay will stop.
localization.status_press_button_to_collect: Press a button to take win
localization.status_gamble_up: Gamble up to 5x or take win
